content: agent1: implementing trans tag metadata tracking (note/created/modified params) in src/jinja2/ext.py — InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node(). Will touch ext.py; will try to keep changes localized and merge carefully if you're also touching this file.

agent1: I modified InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in ext.py to add note/created/modified metadata params on the trans tag (adds a module-level _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS tuple near top, and a metadata dict threaded through parse()/_make_node(), setting output_node.trans_metadata). Should be additive and not touch your new ConditionalI18nExtension class, but flagging since we're both in ext.py. Let me know if you see conflicts when you diff.
